name: Boss says it's not covered cuz I wasn't clocked in - true?

mainEntity.name: Boss says it's not covered cuz I wasn't clocked in - true?

acceptedAnswer.description: **No, if arising out of/in course of employment (e.g., breaks), it's covered.** 'Horseplay' exception rare.[9] Key factors: prove work-related; time logs. Hearing resolves disputes; most qualify. Don't accept denial.[3]
